Article Title: 'Virat Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but ... ': Mohammad Kaif after RCB's win over GT
Article Text:
Mohammad Kaif and Virat Kohli (BCCI Photo)

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

Poll Who do you think is the best six-hitter in IPL history? Chris Gayle Rohit Sharma Virat Kohli Other

NEW DELHI: Former India international cricketer Mohammad Kaif heaped praise on Virat Kohli after the RCB star crossed 300 IPL sixes, highlighting how his growth as a T20 batter reflects adaptability rather than natural power-hitting.Taking to X (formerly Twitter), Kaif wrote, "Virat Kohli taking his IPL 6s tally to 303 is an incredible achievement. Imagine Gayle has 360 and Rohit 310. Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but he worked on his game to meet the demand of the modern game. His greatness is his adaptability and showing courage to come out of his comfort zone."Kohli once again showed that evolution in action during RCB’s five-wicket win over Gujarat Titans, where he scored a fluent 81 while Devdutt Padikkal smashed 55.Their 115-run stand ensured a smooth chase of 206, completed in 18.5 overs.Kohli later credited his partner, saying, "This is the second time Dev (Devdutt Padikkal) has come and done this. You never see him slogging the ball yet he's playing so freely. His innings was the difference in the first half and then I was trying to stay in the game so he won't feel the pressure. Dev was going great guns and the idea was to keep the pressure on the bowlers.There was intent, clarity and feedback from the other and and we didn't have any doubts in the partnership and that's what worked for us. "He also underlined RCB’s batting strength: "We have a tremendous batting lineup. If you look at the talent on display, we have guys who can play good cricket shots, you have the power of Tim David and Shepherd and then you have the smarts of Krunal. So the message is simple - you see a ball to hit, go for it because you have the depth."Firstly, we were quite happy we were able to play five games here and the fans get to see the team again. Special place to play cricket and hopefully we'll be able to come back and play here again later in the season."Earlier, Sai Sudharsan’s composed century powered GT to 205/3, but a slowdown in the death overs kept the target within reach, allowing Kohli and Padikkal to take control and seal another convincing win for RCB.
Article Summary: Mohammad kaif heaps praise on virat kohli after the rcb star crossed 300 ipl sixes. Former india international highlights how his growth as a t20 batter reflects adaptability rather than natural power-hitting. Kohli once again showed that evolution in action during rcb’s five-wicket win over gujarat titans.

Article Title: Scary scenes! Lungi Ngidi taken off in ambulance after suffering head injury in DC vs PBKS IPL match
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

Delhi Capitals pacer Lungi Ngidi suffered a serious head injury while trying to take a catch of Punjab Kings batter Priyansh Arya during their IPL 2026 match in Delhi on Saturday.The South African has been taken to Max Hospital, Pusa Road, in Delhi for further medical examination, news agency PTI reported.The incident happened in the third over of Punjab Kings' chase when Arya played a slash at a full ball on the stumps off Axar Patel. The ball went high towards mid-off, where Ngidi ran back to complete the catch.However, he misjudged the chance and failed to get his hands to the ball. While falling backwards, Ngidi landed badly and hit the back of his head hard on the ground at the Arun Jaitley Stadium.His head bounced off the surface as he fell, and he immediately held his head in pain. He rolled to the side and remained still on the ground for some time, raising immediate concern among players and support staff.The physio and team doctor rushed onto the field and attended to the South African pacer. He stayed on the ground for more than a minute as medical staff checked him. A stretcher was then brought onto the field.The physio was seen speaking to Ngidi while holding his neck, and the fact that he was able to respond brought some relief.An ambulance was brought onto the ground as doctors and physios surrounded him. A neck brace was carefully placed under his head and around his neck before he was prepared to be taken off the field.Punjab Kings head coach Ricky Ponting also walked onto the field as the medical team worked around Ngidi.There were worried faces in the Delhi Capitals camp as the stretcher came out. The hard outfield at the Arun Jaitley Stadium added to concerns about the impact of the fall.The crowd inside the stadium also fell silent as they understood the seriousness of the injury.It appeared unlikely that Ngidi would return to the match after the heavy fall.
Article Summary: Delhi capitals pacer lungi ngidi suffered a serious head injury while trying to take a catch of punjab kings batter priyansh arya during their ipl 2026 match in delhi on saturday. Ngidi landed badly and hit the back of his head hard on the ground at the arun jaitley stadium.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes Injury Update: Patrick Mahomes' comeback remains uncertain ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft: when will he return?
Article Text:
(Image via: Getty)

When Will Patrick Mahomes Be Back? Chiefs Enter Draft With No Clear Answer



As the 2026 NFL Draft approaches, the Kansas City Chiefs are facing an offseason unlike any they’ve had in the Patrick Mahomes era. The million-dollar question or rather, the multi-year contract question, is the timeline for their franchise quarterback’s return.The Reality of the Injury Mahomes, who tore both his ACL and LCL in a devastating blow against the Chargers back on December 14, 2025, is now four months into a long, grueling recovery. Surgery in Dallas confirmed the severity of the damage, and since then, the team has been meticulously managing his rehab.The good news is that Mahomes was in attendance for the start of the Chiefs' voluntary offseason program this week. Head coach Andy Reid has been optimistic, noting that Mahomes is hitting his marks: he’s in meetings, doing weight training, and working closely with the training staff. But the team is being cagey for a reason.As Reid put it, they are going to "play it by ear" and be smart about the process. While Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for Week 1 with no restrictions, he’s also wise enough to admit that he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity of on-field work.This uncertainty has completely shifted the vibe of this year’s draft for Kansas City. Usually, the Chiefs are drafting to solidify a championship roster around a healthy MVP. This year, they are drafting with insurance in mind.The front office already made a major move in March by trading for Justin Fields from the New York Jets. By bringing in Fields, the Chiefs have secured a high-upside backup who can lead the offense if Mahomes isn't 100% by September. This move was huge because it takes the "panic" out of the draft. They no longer have to reach for a quarterback just to survive the first month of the season.Instead, the team can focus on drafting the best players available to bolster the protection around whoever is taking the snaps. Whether it's beefing up the offensive line to keep the pocket clean or grabbing another explosive playmaker to make life easier for the quarterback, the draft strategy has pivoted from "maintaining the dynasty" to "building a bridge."The bottom line is that while Mahomes is pushing to beat the odds and be back for the season opener, the organization is clearly preparing for a scenario where he might need a few extra weeks. For Chiefs fans, the goal for this draft is simple: build a team that can win even if the MVP isn't out there for the first kickoff.
Article Summary: Patrick mahomes tore both his acl and lcl in a devastating blow against the chargers back on december 14, 2025. Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for week 1 with no restrictions, but he’s also wise enough to admit that he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity.

Article Title: Ipl Orange Cap: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi overtakes Virat Kohli, KL Rahul in Orange Cap race after sensational ton
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (AP Photo)

Watch ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK

Orange Cap 2026 standings:

Position Player Runs Average Strike Rate 1 Vaibhav Sooryavanshi 357 44.63 234.87 2 KL Rahul 357 59.50 187.89 3 Virat Kohli 328 54.67 163.18 4 Abhishek Sharma 323 53.83 215.33 5 Heinrich Klassen 320 53.33 153.11

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to pile up records at a staggering pace in IPL 2026, with the teenage sensation rewriting milestones almost every game and now climbing to the very top of the Orange Cap race.Sooryavanshi’s stunning rise reached another landmark as he surged to the top of the Orange Cap standings, overtaking Virat Kohli after yet another explosive hundred for Rajasthan Royals Sooryavanshi now has 357 runs from eight matches at an average of 44.63 and a staggering strike rate of 234.87. Interestingly, KL Rahul also moved to 357 runs following his unbeaten 152 against Punjab Kings. However, it is Sooryavanshi who sits at the top due to his superior strike rate. Kohli, who had led the charts earlier, has 328 runs at an average of 54.67 and a strike rate of 163.18.The latest surge came through a breathtaking innings against Sunrisers Hyderabad, where Sooryavanshi hammered a 37-ball 103, his second IPL hundred. The 15-year-old dominated from the outset and set the tone early, even taking on Praful Hinge with four consecutive sixes in the opening over as a statement of intent.He found strong support in Dhruv Jurel, who compiled a fluent half-century, and together they stitched a 112-run stand for the second wicket that laid the foundation for a massive total. Jurel’s composed 51 off 35 balls ensured the pressure never dipped, while Sooryavanshi continued to dismantle the bowling attack with fearless strokeplay.The youngster brought up his half-century in just 15 balls during the powerplay, continuing a remarkable trend this season. He later converted it into a century in just 36 balls, peppering the boundary with five fours and 12 sixes before being dismissed for 103 off 37 deliveries.Late fireworks from Donovan Ferreira added further momentum as Rajasthan Royals finished with a commanding 228 for 6 in their 20 overs.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals' vaibhav sooryavanshi has overtaken virat kohli at the top of the orange cap standings. The 15-year-old hit 103 against sunrisers hyderabad, his second ipl hundred. He now has 357 runs from eight matches at an average of 44.63 and a staggering strike rate of 234.87.

Article Title: Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage
Article Text:
Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures spark chaos about his wedding ring as his wife stays silent



Is Mike Vrabel getting fired after Dianna Russini had to leave her job?



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has landed himself in major trouble alongside his alleged affair partner Dianna Russini.Though the two initially denied having an affair, their pictures from 2020 sharing a kiss at a bar have sparked outrage.A few hours ago, as Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures from the New York City bar in 2020 sparked chaos, it seems a tiny detail was missed which eagle eyed fans have uncovered.In the pictures, Mike Vrabel was spotted holding Dianna Russini with his left hand as he approached her for a kiss. The New England Patriots’ head coach’s wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage.A fan commented, “The detail in the picture is that he’s touching her with the same hand his wedding ring is on…”, while another fan wrote, “With the wedding ring on and everything. Vrabs needs to step down as HC. Coaches resign or get fired for much less.”A third fan posted, “This was literally the night after the WHO declared COVID a pandemic! They knew their time together would be limited after this night!!”Many fans have expressed how heartbroken they are for Mike Vrabel’s wife, Jennifer Vrabel, and Dianna Russini’s husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, even though both have tried to stay out of the spotlight and remain silent about the alleged affair drama.While Dianna Russini has deleted her account on X, Mike Vrabel has addressed the pictures from 2020 even though he did not directly speak about it,At a recent press conference, after Mike Vrabel expressed that he needs to step away from NFL Draft, he said, “My priorities are my family and this football and in that order…”The New England Patriots’ head coach added, “There's a balance there that I’m going to create. My family needs me this weekend and that’s where I’ll be."While there have been strong speculations of his employment ending soon with the New England Patriots, the team has stayed away from confirming anything for now.
Article Summary: Wedding ring detail in mike vrabel and dianna russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage. New england patriots’ head coach’s wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage.

Article Title: ‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he doesn't drink milk, shares daily diet
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity/ Image:Instagram

Why milk is excluded from his diet

Structure of Ronaldo’s daily diet

Ronaldo maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines/ Instagram

Physical condition and recovery routine

Ronaldo’s recovery routine includes intense sauna sessions and ice baths to maintain peak fitness and longevity/Instagram

Comparison with other players’ diets

Despite milk often being touted as a superdrink rich in protein, calcium and essential vitamins, and widely used by athletes for recovery and muscle support, Cristiano Ronaldo has avoided it as part of his long-standing diet, according to his former private chef, a choice that has aligned with the discipline behind his longevity into a 25th professional season.The 41-year-old, now at Al-Nassr, is closing in on 1,000 career goals after scoring his 969th in a win last weekend. Across spells with Manchester United and Real Madrid, Ronaldo has consistently pointed to discipline in diet and recovery as central to maintaining peak physical condition over many years at the top.Ronaldo’s former chef Giorgio Barone explained that milk is completely removed from his routine, not for performance reasons alone but because of a broader view about consumption.“No milk,” Barone told Covers.com, before outlining the reasoning in detail: “Humans are the only animals that drink the milk of other animals. No other animal drinks milk after three months. Calves don’t drink milk after the age of three months. Animals don’t drink the milk of other animals.“It does not exist in nature. Only human beings continue to drink milk up to 30, 40, 50, and 60 years, and in my view it is wrong. We breastfeed from our mothers, like dogs, wolves, cows and donkeys.It is normal.“After infancy it is not normal. It is against nature.”Barone described Ronaldo’s diet as controlled but varied, built around consistency rather than restriction for its own sake.“Cristiano Ronaldo’s diet is balanced,” he said. “He eats a little bit of everything, but it’s always healthy.”He then detailed how that plays out across the day: “Starting with breakfast, he would have an avocado with coffee, eggs and no sugar. Absolutely no sugar. Lunch could be chicken, fish and always vegetables. If he needs carbohydrates, he gets them through vegetables, so he doesn’t need anything made with flour.“Nothing like pasta, bread and other types of food. In the evening, he eats light foods, usually fish or meat in the form of fillet. It’s always accompanied by vegetables.”The approach removes refined sugar entirely and avoids flour-based carbohydrates, relying instead on protein, vegetables and healthy fats.That structure is reflected in Ronaldo’s physical condition, with body fat levels maintained below 10 per cent.His routine extends beyond diet, incorporating recovery methods such as saunas and ice baths, which he and his partner Georgina Rodriguez are known to use regularly.The same discipline has been visible in public moments as well. During the 2021 European Championship, Ronaldo moved a bottle of Coca-Cola away from a press conference table and told viewers to “drink water,” a moment that wiped billions off the company’s market value.Barone also addressed comparisons with Erling Haaland, who has spoken about drinking raw milk as part of his own routine.While rejecting milk, Barone agreed with other elements of that approach, particularly the inclusion of organ meats: “I agree with [Erling Haaland’s diet of] eating the organs. The liver, heart and brain are all healthy foods. They are superfoods. Cristiano liked liver too. I love it. It’s very rich in iron, and it’s important in the diet, so for the organs, I approve, but not for the milk.”
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity. Former chef giorgio barone reveals the structure of ronaldo's daily diet. The 41-year-old maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines.

Article Title: Ronaldo has three final career dreams he must fulfil before retirement, Messi has already completed the first
Article Text:
As Messi takes control of UE Cornellà, he joins Ronaldo in Spanish football as club owners in rival roles.(Image via Getty)

The missing piece: a World Cup title

The race to 1,000 career goals

A different kind of milestone: playing with Cristiano Jr

Current form and final stretch

Poll Do you think Cristiano Ronaldo will lead Portugal to a World Cup victory in 2026? Yes, he will lead them to victory. No, they won't win the World Cup.

At a time when most players are years into retirement and settled into coaching or punditry, 41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo is choosing his final act carefully, with three clear goals still on his agenda. The Portugal forward is expected to make his sixth appearance at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which he has indicated will be his last, bringing his career to a close with one final push for legacy, numbers, and something more personal.The most obvious goal is also the one that has defined the final chapter of his international career. Ronaldo has never won a World Cup, despite playing in five editions between 2006 and 2022, making 22 appearances and scoring eight goals. His best finish remains fourth place in 2006.Winning the World Cup is the one major honour missing from his record, and it is also the one already secured by Lionel Messi . That comparison has followed both players for years, and it remains central to how their careers are measured.Portugal are not traditionally among the favourites, and historically have only reached the semi-finals twice, in 1966 and 2006. However, their European Championship win in 2016 serves as a reminder that they can compete beyond expectations.Despite a minor hamstring injury in March 2026 and a previous red-card suspension that was later lifted, Portugal coach Roberto Martínez continues to view Ronaldo as a key part of the squad heading into the tournament.Alongside the international ambition, Ronaldo is also closing in on a statistical milestone that has rarely been approached in football history.He scored his 969th career goal on April 19, 2026, during Al Nassr FC’s 4-0 win over Al Wasl FC in the AFC Champions League 2 quarter-finals, finding the net in the 11th minute. That leaves him within reach of the 1,000-goal mark, a figure that has become a clear personal target.Messi, currently on 905 goals, is also within distance, although the approach appears different. While Ronaldo continues to push towards the milestone, Messi has shown less urgency, even passing up opportunities, including allowing Nicolás Otamendi to take a penalty so he could mark his farewell moment with the national team, a gesture that shows he’s not chasing numbers in the same way.The contrast is not about ability but intent. Ronaldo’s pursuit of 1,000 has become part of his closing narrative, a target he is actively chasing rather than something that might happen along the way.Also read: Could Ronaldo play alongside his son at Al-Nassr next season? Reports say club planning step-up after 16th birthday The third objective is less conventional but equally significant for Ronaldo. There is now a realistic possibility that he could share the pitch at senior level with his son, Cristiano Ronaldo Jr..The idea has gained traction after reports that Al Nassr are considering promoting Ronaldo’s eldest son to the first team. Cristiano Jr. will turn 16 in June, and while that step would still depend on development and timing, the possibility is no longer distant.If it happens, it would place Ronaldo in a rare category of athletes who have competed alongside their children at the highest level. The comparison most often drawn is with LeBron James and Bronny James, who have moved towards a similar milestone in the NBA.In football, such instances are extremely rare, particularly at top-flight level, which is why this objective carries a different kind of weight. It is not tied to trophies or records, but to a moment that would stand on its own in the sport’s history.Ronaldo’s form suggests these targets are not purely symbolic. Even at 41, he continues to influence games and contribute decisively for Al Nassr, maintaining a level that keeps him relevant both at club level and internationally. His current deal with the Saudi club runs until 2027, signed in a record-breaking extension that will keep him there into his 42nd year, with reports placing his earnings at around €200 million per season, along with performance bonuses and commercial add-ons tied to goals and success.On the international front, he remains central to Portugal’s plans for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in June, which is expected to mark the final chapter of his international career. He continues to play a key role in qualifying and leadership within the squad, consistently guiding a younger generation, while still leading the attack as they prepare for one last major tournament together at the highest level.
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo is closing in on 1,000 career goals. He has never won a world cup, despite playing in five editions between 2006 and 2022. The 41-year-old is expected to make his sixth appearance at the 2026 fifa world cup. Ronaldo could play alongside his son cristiano jr at al-nassr next season.

Article Title: IPL 2026: KL Rahul poised to overtake MS Dhoni, need 13 runs to...
Article Text:
KL Rahul poised to overtake MS Dhoni

Watch Ravindra Jadeja picks the key turning point in Rajasthan Royals win Ravindra Jadeja picks the key turning point in Rajasthan Royals win

Closing in on Dhoni

Poll What do you think about new aggressive batting approach of KL Rahul this season? It's effective Needs improvement

Rank Player Total Runs Matches Centuries Fifties 1 Virat Kohli 8,908 273 8 65 2 Rohit Sharma 7,183 276 2 48 3 Shikhar Dhawan 6,769 222 2 51 4 David Warner 6,565 184 4 62 5 Suresh Raina 5,528 205 1 39 6 MS Dhoni 5,439 278 0 24 7 KL Rahul 5,427 151 5 42 8 Ajinkya Rahane 5,184 205 2 34 9 AB de Villiers 5,162 184 3 40 10 Suryakumar Yadav 4,432 172 2 30

KL Rahul is on the verge of a major milestone in IPL history as he needs just 13 runs in tonight’s clash against Punjab Kings to overtake MS Dhoni and become the sixth-highest run-scorer in the tournament’s history.Rahul heads into the contest with confidence, having recently played a match-winning knock against Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium, a venue close to his heart as his home ground in domestic cricket. The Delhi Capitals batter has shown a noticeable shift in approach this season, batting with greater intent. He is currently striking at close to 170, hitting a boundary every 2.6 balls, reflecting his more attacking mindset at the top.So far this season, Rahul has scored 205 runs in six innings with a strike rate of 166.67, including two half-centuries, with a best score of 92.In his IPL career, Rahul has represented multiple franchises: Sunrisers Hyderabad, Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Punjab Kings, and Lucknow Super Giants, before joining Delhi Capitals and amassed 5,427 runs in 151 matches (142 innings) at an impressive average of 45.60 and a strike rate of 136.97.His tally includes five centuries and 42 fifties, with a highest score of 132*.On the other hand, Chennai Super Kings legend MS Dhoni has scored 5,439 runs in 278 matches (242 innings) at an average of 38.30 and a strike rate of 137.45, including 24 fifties, with a top score of 84*.Rahul has already surpassed Dhoni in one key metric, the most 50-plus scores as a designated wicketkeeper-batter in IPL history, with 31 such scores compared to Dhoni’s 24. If Rahul crosses Dhoni tonight, his next target will be Suresh Raina, who sits fifth on the all-time list with 5,528 runs.Here are the top 10 leading run-scores in the history of IPL:
Article Summary: Kl rahul is on the verge of a major milestone in ipl history. He needs just 13 runs in tonight’s clash against punjab kings to overtake ms dhoni. The delhi capitals batter has shown a noticeable shift in approach this season, batting with greater intent. If rahul crosses dhoni tonight, his next target will be suresh raina.

Article Title: "He fathered her child": Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga
Article Text:
Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga.(Image via Getty Images)

Dianna Russini might have hinted at her alleged affair with Mike Vrabel through her child

Mike Vrabel stepped away from NFL Draft after he reportedly got to know his pictures with Dianna Russini from 2020 will be published

Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down.Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.In the last few hours, a post of Dianna Russini about the birth of her child with her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, has sparked shockwaves across the league.The post made on 11th August, 2021, reads as, “Keep looking at my almost 4 day old son Michael while trying to figure out who are the best Michaels to ever play and coach in the NFL?”While the post seems like an innocent question related to the name of her child, it has raised eyebrows considering Mike Vrabel’s legal name is Michael George Vrabel.With the former The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini naming her first born the same name as her alleged affair partner, it has sparked outrage among fans.This has also led to Barstool Sports’ Dave Portnoy to make a post that read as, “I can’t believe that I think there is a chance Russini fathered Vrabel’s child. That is how nuts this has gotten. You just can’t name your kid the same name as the guy you are having an affair with.”To make matters worse, just a couple of hours ago, Page Six published photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini engaging in a kiss at a New York City bar in 2020.This has now raised concerns about Dianna Russini’s first born as many fans are urging her husband to get a DNA test done.However, both Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, have stayed distant from all the rumors about their marriage going downhill as their oldest son gets dragged into the drama.Interestingly, as per Page Six, the outlet did ask for the popular head coach, Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s comments before publishing their photos together from 2020.Just hours later, the New England Patriots’ head coach announced that he will be stepping away from the NFL Draft as he seeks counselling for all the things that have been happening in his life.The popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, has stayed silent as their new pictures spark shockwaves across the league.
Article Summary: Dianna russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the mike vrabel saga. The new england patriots’ head coach has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors refuse to die down.

Article Title: “Titans uncovered the affair”: Mike Vrabel’s exit from the Tennessee Titans tied to alleged Dianna Russini drama
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s exit from the Tennessee Titans tied to alleged Dianna Russini drama.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel’s firing from the Tennessee Titans linked to his alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini



Will Mike Vrabel be fired by the New England Patriots because of Dianna Russini?



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has taken some time off from work to be with his family as his alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini continue to get worse.Though the New England Patriots have not yet hinted at firing Mike Vrabel ahead of the new season, it seems his time with the Tennessee Titans is being viewed differently.A few hours ago, Fox Sports Radio host Jared Smith made a post on X which read as, “We're like one story away from finding out the Titans uncovered the affair and it being the reason they fired him in 2024…” and millions have agreed with him.But nothing has been confirmed yet as the Tennessee Titans maintain their fair share of distance from the alleged affair drama concerning their ex coach, Mike Vrabel.For the unversed, 2024 proved to be a rocky year for Mike Vrabel as he dealt with being fired by the Tennessee Titans after six seasons with the team.Back in January 2024, the Tennessee Titans' controlling owner Amy Adams Strunk spoke about how the team never considered trading Mike Vrabel and instead fired him.The Tennessee Titans' controlling owner Amy Adams Strunk said, "Yes, there was. But there's a bit of misconception about a coach's contract, say versus a player's contract. A coach's contract, you can't trade them unless they are a willing partner to that trade…”She added, “So, yes, we thought about it but at the end of the day with league rules the way they are it would have maybe put us back three weeks and you know, to get the right head coach I was just not willing to go to the back of the line and take a chance of missing out on someone we really wanted."For now, all eyes are on what the New England Patriots choose to do next with Mike Vrabel, as there are strong rumors about the team firing him.However, nothing has been confirmed yet as the New England Patriots continue to stand by Mike Vrabel’s side amid his alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini,
Article Summary: Mike vrabel’s exit from the tennessee titans tied to alleged dianna russini drama. Fox sports radio host jared smith made a post on x which read as, “we're like one story away from finding out the titans uncovered the affair and it being the reason they fired him in 2024…” and millions have agreed with him.

Article Title: Luka Doncic Injury Update: Why Luka Doncic isn't playing for Los Angeles Lakers tonight vs. Houston Rockets? Injury update on Los Angeles star ahead of Game 3
Article Text:
Luka Doncic wont be playing tonight (Image via Imagn Images)

Lakers aim to take control in Game 3 as Luka Doncic remains sidelined

It was unexpected that the Los Angeles Lakers would start their first-round playoff series against the Houston Rockets with a 2-0 advantage. Now, the Lakers are preparing for a pivotal Game 3 matchup with the Houston Rockets. But without Luka Doncic, their leading scorer, Los Angeles has had to adjust to life without him.Many thought the short-handed No. 4 seed was doomed. However, the Lakers are only two victories away from making it to the Western Conference semifinals because to back-to-back outstanding games from shooter Luke Kennard and age-defying contributions from LeBron James.Although they don't exactly need to win Game 3, Los Angeles has to take a dominating 3-0 lead because they are short-handed. Naturally, the Rockets want to avoid that by getting their offense back on track.Without superstar Kevin Durant, they shot only 38% in Game 1, and their performance wasn't any better with him. In Game 2, Houston scored just 94 points on just 40% of their field goals. In his comeback, Durant did score 23 points.Unfortunately for the Lakers, Doncic has already been ruled out for the upcoming postseason matchup, so they will still be without him on Friday night when they play the Rockets in Game 3.A new update was given by Shams Charania of ESPN. Doncic isn't anticipated to play in this series against the Rockets, he said.That is a setback for Los Angeles, but with the Rockets leading 2-0 and successfully defending home court, all the emphasis is on them. Reaves might be able to make a comeback if the series goes to six or seven games.Shams claims that Reaves is getting closer to making a comeback than Doncic. The ideal situation for Los Angeles would be to win either Game 3 or Game 4 and finish the series in Game 5 back in Los Angeles.There would have been far more stress going into Friday if Los Angeles had lost either of their first two playoff games against the Rockets. Not having Doncic in the lineup isn't the end of the world, either, since the Lakers have total control over the series and, really, just need one road victory to feel secure about finishing it.The Lakers' ultimate objective is to easily defeat the Rockets in the first round so that Doncic has enough time to recuperate before playing again. The Lakers are following the plan thus far, and it is already helping them.
Article Summary: The los angeles lakers lead the houston rockets 2-0 in their first-round playoff series. Luka doncic has been ruled out for the upcoming postseason matchup. Luke kennard and lebron james have led the lakers to back-to-back victories. The lakers need to win either game 3 or game 4 to take control of the series.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Punjab Kings script history, become second-fastest team to...
Article Text:
Punjab Kings' Prabhsimran Singh and Priyansh Arya (AP Photo)

Watch ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK

Punjab Kings produced a breathtaking response to Delhi Capitals’ massive total, with openers Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh tearing into the attack and rewriting powerplay records in IPL 2026.Chasing a daunting 264 after KL Rahul ’s unbeaten 152 and Nitish Rana ’s 91 powered Delhi to 264 for 2, Punjab needed a fearless start. What followed was one of the most explosive powerplay displays in IPL history. Arya and Prabhsimran took DC’s bowlers to the cleaners, racing to 100 in just 5.2 overs, the second-fastest team hundred in IPL history. Only Sunrisers Hyderabad have gone quicker, reaching the mark in 5 overs against Delhi at the same venue in 2024.By the end of the powerplay, Punjab had surged to 116 without loss, the second-highest powerplay total ever in the IPL. The opening pair showed no signs of pressure despite the steep chase, attacking from the outset and maintaining a relentless scoring rate.Arya set the tone early with a blistering start, taking the attack to the bowlers in the powerplay. His aggressive intent was matched perfectly by Prabhsimran, who continued his fine form with a stunning assault of his own.The right-hander raced to 71 not out off just 23 balls in the powerplay, registering one of the highest individual scores in overs 1-6 in IPL history.The duo’s approach completely flipped the narrative of the match. What looked like an imposing total quickly began to feel within reach as Delhi’s bowlers struggled to contain the flow of runs. Boundaries came at will, and the field placements were rendered ineffective as both batters found gaps with ease and cleared the ropes regularly.The stand was eventually broken after the powerplay, but not before significant damage had been done. Arya was dismissed for 43 off 17 balls, falling to captain Axar Patel , while Prabhsimran’s explosive innings came to an end on 76 off just 26 deliveries when he was trapped lbw by Kuldeep Yadav.Earlier, Delhi Capitals had dominated proceedings with the bat. Rahul’s 152 not out, the highest score by an Indian in IPL history, and Rana’s 91 came in a record 220-run partnership off just 96 balls. That effort had set up what seemed like a match-winning total.
Article Summary: Punjab kings produced a breathtaking response to delhi capitals’ massive total. Priyansh arya and prabhsimran singh tore into the attack and rewriting powerplay records in ipl 2026. Punjab had surged to 116 without loss, the second-highest powerplay total ever in the ipl.

NEW DELHI: In a big boost for Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH), their captain Pat Cummins came back to lead the side and opted to field first after winning the toss against Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur in IPL 2026 match on Saturday."We are going to have a bowl first. The wicket looks good, try and see what we have to chase down. I feel really fresh, it has been while, I have good preparation, body feels well. He's (Kishan) fantastic, four wins in the first 7 games, he played that SRH game - bold, fearless style of cricket . We know the pitch really well in Hyderabad. This is the first game here for both teams, it will be a challenge. I come in for Madushanka. Hinge comes in for Harsh," Cummins said at the toss.Meanwhile, RR skipper Riyan Parag said, "We were looking to do that (bowling first) as well. But last couple of seasons we have not done well chasing, no problems batting first. We know the wicket really well. We had our camp here. There might be dew but it won't be too much. Last year we fell short by a couple of overs, just want to put a collective 40 overs. NEW DELHI: The Indian Premier League 2026 clash between Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings turned into a record-laden spectacle, with milestones tumbling thick and fast. After commanding knocks from KL Rahul and Nitish Rana for Delhi Capitals, Punjab Kings opener Prabhsimran Singh carved his name into an elite IPL list.Prabhsimran became only the third batter in IPL history to smash six boundaries in a single over. The blistering assault came against Mukesh Kumar, with the young opener hammering six fours in one over.The rare feat was first achieved by Ajinkya Rahane in 2012 while representing Rajasthan Royals, when he struck six consecutive fours off Sreenath Aravind of Royal Challengers Bengaluru.Nearly nine years later, Prithvi Shaw replicated the feat in 2021 for Delhi Capitals. Facing Shivam Mavi of Kolkata Knight Riders, Shaw slammed six fours in the very first over of the innings, becoming the first batter to do so during the powerplay.Now, Prabhsimran has joined this exclusive club, further highlighting the IPL’s reputation as a stage for fearless stroke-play.He capped off his sensational outing with a blistering 76 off just 26 balls before being dismissed by Kuldeep Yadav.
Article Summary: Prabhsimran singh becomes only the third batter in ipl history to smash six boundaries in a single over. The rare feat was first achieved by ajinkya rahane in 2012 while representing rajasthan royals. Nearly nine years later, prithvi shaw replicated the feat in 2021 for delhi capitals.

NEW DELHI: A red-hot KL Rahul produced one of the most extraordinary innings in IPL history, hammering an unbeaten 152 to power Delhi Capitals to a massive 264/2 against Punjab Kings at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on a scorching Saturday.On a sweltering 41-degree afternoon, Rahul tore into the PBKS bowling attack, hammering 16 fours and nine sixes in his 67-ball masterclass at a staggering strike rate of 226. His knock is now the highest individual score by an Indian batter in IPL history, surpassing several elite names, and also ranks as the third-highest overall in the tournament - behind Chris Gayle’s 175* and Brendon McCullum’s 158*.Rahul became only the third batter in IPL history to breach the 150-run mark, and just the second Indian after Tilak Varma to score 150-plus in men’s T20s. The innings also marked his fastest IPL century, coming in just 47 balls, bettering his previous best of 56.He was brilliantly supported by Nitish Rana, who blasted 91, as the duo stitched a stunning 220-run stand off just 95 balls - now the second-highest partnership in IPL history. Their assault powered DC to their highest-ever total, with a staggering 162 runs coming in overs 11-20, one of the most explosive death-over performances seen in the league.Rahul also rewrote franchise records, going past Rishabh Pant’s 128* to register the highest individual score for Delhi Capitals. In another remarkable feat, he became the first player in IPL history to score multiple centuries for three different teams - DC, PBKS, and Lucknow Super Giants.Among all IPL batters with over 1000 runs, Rahul’s consistency remains elite, with an average of 46.88 - second only to Sai Sudharsan.152* - KL Rahul vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026151 - Tilak Varma vs Meghalaya, Rajkot, 2024148 - Abhishek Sharma vs Bengal, Secunderabad, 2025147 - Shreyas Iyer vs Sikkim, Indore, 2019146* - Punit Bisht vs Mizoram, Chennai, 20218989 - Virat Kohli7183 - Rohit Sharma6769 - Shikhar Dhawan6565 - David Warner5579 - KL Rahul5528 - Suresh Raina5439 - MS DhoniOf the 109 batters with 1000-plus IPL runs, only Sai Sudharsan has a higher average (47.16) than Rahul’s 46.88.172/2 - RCB vs GL, Bengaluru, 2016162/2 - PBKS vs CSK, Cuttack, 2014162/1 - DC vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026175* - Chris Gayle (RCB) vs PWI, Bengaluru, 2013158* - Brendon McCullum (KKR) vs RCB, Bengaluru, 2008152* - KL Rahul (DC) vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026141 - Abhishek Sharma (SRH) vs PBKS, Hyderabad, 2025140* - Quinton de Kock (KKR) vs LSG, Mumbai DYP, 2022Rahul is the second Indian to register a 150-plus score in Men’s T20 cricket, after Tilak Varma, who’d scored 151 for Hyderabad against Meghalaya in Rajkot in 2024/25.229 - AB de Villiers & Virat Kohli vs GL, Bengaluru, 2016220 - KL Rahul & Nitish Rana vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026215* - AB de Villiers & Virat Kohli vs MI, Mumbai WS, 2015210* - KL Rahul & Quinton de Kock vs KKR, Mumbai DYP, 2022210 - Sai Sudharsan & Shubman Gill vs CSK, Ahmedabad, 2024
Article Summary: Kl rahul hits unbeaten 152 to power delhi capitals to 264/2 against punjab kings. Rahul's knock is now the highest individual score by an indian batter in ipl history. The innings also marked his fastest ipl century, coming in just 47 balls, bettering his previous best of 56.

Article Title: “He felt it wasn’t authentic”: Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour
Article Text:
Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour.(Image via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce reportedly did not want to hang out with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds alongside Taylor Swift

Taylor Swift remains busy as Travis Kelce goes vocal with his professional commitments

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had a pretty strong bond as they continue to hang out with each other’s friends and siblings.While things have taken a wrong turn between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively, it seems the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, was never a big fans of the bond they once had.A few weeks ago, as per Rob Shuter, a source revealed, “He hated the double-dating…”The source added, “He felt like it was all optics and no authenticity” and didn’t want forced hangouts or performative friendships.”To make it worse, more than Blake Lively, it seems Travis Kelce had issues with her husband, the popular Hollywood actor Ryan Reynolds as he reportedly struggled to “trust him” and maintained distance from him.However, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained their fair share of distance from anything related to the power couple in Hollywood, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds.For now, all that the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, is focusing on is their wedding as Travis Kelce remains busy with his work commitments.While Taylor Swift has remained private in the last few days, Travis Kelce announced his podcast, New Heights, will be hosted live in Los Angeles in June 2026.The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player also opened up about NFL Draft in a recent episode as he shares the type of players that the team should recruit.The popular tight end said, “I’m just hoping for a guy that loves ball, man. I think one of the things that you just want to have when you get back into the building after a season like last year, man, you just want guys that love what they’re [expletive] doing.”Travis Kelce added, “I think it’s one of the things that I look for in these young guys when they come in, is just how infectious is your energy? I need that out of these young guys.”While star player, Travis Kelce has been public about his work life, he has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to Taylor Swift.
Article Summary: Travis kelce reportedly questioned taylor swift’s bond with blake lively and ryan reynolds long before things turned sour. Travis kelce announced his podcast, new heights, will be hosted live in los angeles in june 2026. The kansas city chiefs’ star player has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to taylor swift.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams' backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season
Article Text:
Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season.(Image via X)

Green Bay Packers linked to former Los Angeles Rams ’ backup QB Jimmy Garoppolo

The Green Bay Packers’ performance in the last season dipped since 2024 as the team finished the season with 9 wins and 8 losses.As the Green Bay Packers lost the Wild Card round to the Chicago Bears, all eyes are on the next season as the team focuses on its roster.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar predicted that the Green Bay Packers could make a move for the former Los Angeles Rams’ player, Jimmy Garoppolo.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar noted in a recent report, “Green Bay still has Desmond Ridder on its roster, but Ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his NFL career. As the Packers look to enter the NFC playoff picture once again, they could choose to bring in a veteran passer instead.”Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar added, “Garoppolo may be a strong fit in Green Bay given his experience playing under McVay. Packers head coach Matt LaFleur was previously on McVay's coaching staff, serving as the Rams' offensive coordinator in 2017.”However, the Green Bay Packers have maintained their distance from trade talks concerning Jimmy Garoppolo.Interestingly, the Los Angeles Rams are keen to re-sign Jimmy Garoppolo after his performance suffered in the last two seasons.A week ago, as per Stu Jackson of the team's official website, the Los Angeles Rams’ head coach, Sean McVay opened up about Jimmy Garoppolo as he said, "Hey, I'd love to have Jimmy Garoppolo back with us…”The popular head coach added, "That's a big deal for us. He's earned the right to be able to take his time and do whatever he wants."But Jimmy Garoppolo has stayed silent as he deals with speculations of a potential retirement after a poor run on the field in the last two seasons.In the last season, Jimmy Garoppolo played in only three games after signing a one year deal worth $11 million with the Los Angeles Rams.Jimmy Garoppolo did not attempt a pass as his appearances were limited to kneel-downs to seal victories.In 2024, Jimmy Garoppolo missed the preseason as he was suspended from the first two games of the regular season for violating the league's performance-enhancing drug policy.For now, all eyes are on what star player, Jimmy Garoppolo chooses to do next with his career amid retirement rumors.
Article Summary: Green bay packers could target $11m former los angeles rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season. Green bay packers lost the wild card round to the chicago bears. The packers still have desmond ridder on its roster, but ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his nfl career.
